_doc: Demo-prompt replay fixtures for the experimental /ask chat. Each entry drives one POST to /api/ask via the replay harness in replay.spec.ts. The harness streams the AI SDK UI message response, captures every tool call + assistant text + reference, then asserts the expected tool path was followed. Catches LLM-routing regressions (e.g. the treatment_group bug fixed in Day 4) that unit tests on individual tool handlers can never catch — because they target the LLM's tool selection, not the tools themselves.

_schema.prompt: natural-language question sent verbatim as a single user UIMessage
_schema.expected_tools: array of tool names that must fire, order-sensitive (allows extra exploratory calls in between as long as each expected tool appears in this order somewhere in the trace)
_schema.forbidden_tools: array of tool names that must NOT fire (catches misroutes — e.g. for behavioral comparison prompts, forbid query_documents because tabular_query is the right path)
_schema.expected_chart_fence: the fenced code-block language tag the assistant must emit (violin-chart, signal-chart, or null)
_schema.expected_text_contains: array of case-insensitive substrings the final assistant text must contain (use sparingly — over-specific assertions are brittle when the model rewords)
_schema.expected_references_min: minimum number of [^N] footnote definitions in the answer's ### Sources section
_schema.notes: explanation of what this prompt is testing

prompts.prompt: How many published datasets does NDI have?
prompts.notes: Catalog count — system prompt explicitly says 'How many datasets?' -> list_published_datasets with pageSize=1 and read totalNumber. Should NOT semantic-search.

prompts.prompt: Tell me about the Dabrowska BNST dataset.
prompts.notes: PI-name query. System prompt says ANYTIME a user names a PI -> semantic_search_datasets FIRST because catalog title doesn't carry PI last name. Catches regressions where the model reaches for list_published_datasets and fails (PI name won't substring-match).

prompts.prompt: Across all public datasets, how many subjects are Sprague-Dawley rats?
prompts.notes: Cross-dataset structured count -> ndi_query with scope='public'. Catches regressions where the model defaults to query_documents (single-dataset only) or list_published_datasets.

prompts.prompt: What probes were used in the Dabrowska BNST dataset?
prompts.notes: Within-dataset document-level question. Per the system prompt, 'what probes were used in dataset X' -> query_documents with className=probe. Multi-step: model needs to find the dataset ID first (semantic_search or list_published) then query_documents.

prompts.prompt: Compare elevated plus maze open-arm north entries between Saline and CNO in the Dabrowska BNST dataset.
prompts.notes: The treatment_group regression we already fixed. Forbids query_documents to catch the bug where the LLM would pivot to query_documents after the first tabular_query miss instead of using empty_hint.retry_with. Must emit violin-chart fence — the chat UI gates rendering on this fence.

prompts.prompt: Show me a voltage trace from the Dabrowska BNST dataset.
prompts.notes: Signal-plot shortcut path. The Dabrowska metadata sidecar has binarySignalExample with docId + filename, so the model should pull that from semantic_search and call fetch_signal directly without exploring class_counts/query_documents. Must emit signal-chart fence.

prompts.prompt: How was the vmspikesummary class computed? Find an example and walk its provenance.
prompts.notes: Provenance walk. System prompt: 'how was this computed' -> walk_provenance with direction=upstream. Allows ndi_query or query_documents first to find a vmspikesummary doc, then walk_provenance must fire.

prompts.prompt: What is the average subject weight in the Dabrowska BNST dataset?
prompts.notes: Aggregation — system prompt: 'average/mean/median of X' -> aggregate_documents. Catches regressions where the model tries to do arithmetic itself on a query_documents result.

prompts.expected_text_contains_doc: NCBITaxon:10116 is Rattus norvegicus (rat). Catches regressions where the model guesses (system prompt says DO NOT GUESS what a CURIE means).
prompts.notes: Direct CURIE lookup -> lookup_ontology. References-min=0 because OLS lookups don't always carry our internal references contract.

prompts.prompt: Should I use Adam or SGD as the optimizer when training my neural net?
prompts.notes: Out-of-scope deflection. System prompt explicitly says: 'general neuroscience advice, code generation, opinions' -> redirect. Must NOT call any NDI tool. Must redirect to /datasets (or /platform). Catches the regression where the LLM tries to be helpful and starts searching for ML datasets in NDI.
